key_insight: LiST is a unified data platform that automatically captures, curates, analyzes, and shares the full lifecycle of materials science data from synthesis to modeling.
engineering_relevance: By organizing tens of thousands of samples with API access and DOI-ready data packages, LiST improves reproducibility, collaboration, and closed-loop materials design.
method: Automated ingestion of experimental and theoretical data
REST API access for synthesis and property datasets
Data packaging with DOIs for publication and sharing
evidence_signal: The platform currently hosts synthesis and property data for approximately twenty thousand samples produced using techniques including bulk crystal growth, MOCVD, and MBE.
watch_item: Adoption depends on consistent data curation and interoperability across different experimental and modeling workflows.
paper_title: Lifetime Sample Tracking (LiST): A Data Platform for Materials Science
